MIME-Version: 1.0
From: Start Daily <microsoft.start@email2.microsoft.com>
To: emil.skogsund@gmail.com
Date: Tue, 14 May 2024 02:39:18 -0700
Subject: Michael Cohen to face bruising cross-examination by Trump's lawyers
Message-ID: <66433149.d40a0220.8c2e4.b4afSMTPIN_ADDED_BROKEN@mx.google.com>
Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8"

<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en-us"><head><meta charset="utf-8"><meta content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" name="viewport"><title>Start Daily</title></head><body bgcolor="#f0f0f0"><table align="center" bgcolor="#f0f0f0" border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" dir="left" style="font-family:Segoe UI,-apple-system,helvetica Neue,Helvetica,Lucida Grande,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif" width="100%">
        <tr><td><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" height="52" style="background-color:#fff;box-shadow:0 3px 0 transparent" width="600"><tr><td align="left" style="padding:0;min-width:150px;min-height:50px;vertical-align:middle"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAADRIQKAVPHBNGS4D4AMJ7WNATX34Z7XQ4UBIYGAVEP2ZNRXO5QGO6WPG2FSI3CKZVX2C7GIG4Q4G2MMKGJQZ5AXXVEVLKOGSDMFHHY4PLI5B3CFAYAFJFSL4P5GYAFC6LZ4UWVYQH2AXRA5MMIAO2M2RQUBZRTB2Y5PGQCA7YM3XMRXH3JDN6&d=AIAADGFCODSQQY5BTTWDTC65D3UW7LNK3KMAKFLEPDZTKOYMQ5YJW6O3UIFB6GZOX2SQKUTUWYNYGADBNWHYJQ7E56P6FO65WFNB3T63LKBJBDOYD4KOAYQUFRJSGKED2VIT5QFAMG3JTYUBYFBAU4POSOYOYPAP3SDDYRSUKCGVZKC3D55ODZXPZIEU7EDTJD5OPY7RNQMXXUOKDA&" id="NewHeaderMicrosoftStartImg" style="border:none" target="_blank"><img alt="MSN" height="45" src="https://www.bing.com/th?id=OEP.34427CBFF3D4D1C8119FED16222B4DEE&pid=BEmail" style="border:none;text-align:center" width="150"></a></td></tr></table></td></tr>
        <tr><td style="padding:24px 0 24px 0" align="center"><table style="padding:0 3px 0 3px" cellspacing="0" width="600"><tr><td style="padding-right:35px"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAAD6EDWUKTGH4MDDMJ7DCCKZ33RAW4YFJ3EH4OQIO5X6PZJOCOQKIVXG4XPP566FGHJMLJ3LXJSDENAQ3ZJPJRUVUKBLWHWYFTL4EUSEU6CYVNNWPEVGVQNXOZPKCUBEP46FAW7IEDG2NVRJOBDDGJ7RGUIA5WU22OOFJF473UDT6DCNJBMVSU&d=AIAADHP3SOKTYCHER5RYEKETN6HV3G52Y3R37XIQC4ZD3S75DWJ4KT6TPIAANUBX4L7TTB47ZP5PFJ4DE4PO2AZVTU26IQFT4TLXDYD3QWTMR2DYB5FHHDOREPK4ZJHA4PA4HDENT5MPJO6JN6HQPRVWSBPIISYBN6PD7NTKP5JESKNSE6AAT32V&" id="StartHeaderLogo" style="border:none" target="_blank"><img alt="Logo" height="110" src="https://www.bing.com/th?id=OEP.4464C20B10A9835DC26D56A7CF42E3D7&pid=BEmail&w=230&h=110&dpr=1&c=8&rs=2" style="border:none;margin:0" width="230"></a></td><td><table style="border-collapse:collapse"><tr><td height="50"></td></tr><tr><td style="border-left:2px solid;border-left-color:#ffb980;vertical-align:bottom;padding-left:10px"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAAD2SJ4VUQ6L33275PF75UOQGXUIATCZZDIBSWDV2QPEA5DA63QP34EGZRHHSF2W7NEVV7RA4DYDG73MENIEULMUKUTVLVYIQGTSRTXPO5FQGWI6ZFGVRSJHODSGGPIBWX2XHISQJ7Q6F7E4YMCGBWRCSORUZWNG2I6EN4BR6VQR2N7DQTGAAY&d=AIAADACGMVJ3ZQT2UZLSWVRT3SZ4HOSTDFOK7LRZQQE3QGOSHZAA6LWDPDAVC2KUI5TC3CQCC2OJI2R2I3PNCPG3UBLYJYNM3MNOWJOEIPATNZ473GAUZHDFPDF3UYN4KPHIBMY6UZJB7QXGLYLTC6NAFXRNGYRHLXHMCJRJISGHGZESKSDKBWVN&" id="StartHeaderDescription" style="border:none;text-align:center;text-decoration:none" target="_blank"><span style="color:#464646;font-size:15px;font-weight:400">Start Daily brings you trending news every weekday</span></a></td></tr></table></td></tr></table></td><td><img alt="" height="1" src="https://www.msn.com/newsletter/t/o?telemetrytoken=9e146be431b341948ed613323644aae9&market=en-us&topicid=d015f8a4-f187-4810-888d-afa2d49537cb" style="border:none" width="1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></td></tr>
